payload.answer: Recorded once despite repeated delivery of the same input.
citations: Same input delivered three times: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.

entity_resolution.reason: The input identifies Sam only by first name and Goldman context; this may refer to an existing Sam but is insufficient for strict unique resolution.

memory_cards.statement: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.

details: Accepted a single durable memory card for the repeated identical message.
Preserved ambiguity around Sam and Goldman rather than over-resolving.
